verdicts.note: He is an outsider to elected office, but prior congressional candidacy and military experience make +1 more proportionate than the maximal renewal score.
Public safety and homelessness accountability support the enforcement direction, but not a maximal placement.
A completed city-council term is a proven elected record rather than a genuinely mixed experience profile.
The dossier lists service priorities but explicitly lacks funding and policy mechanisms; it does not establish expansion as the primary lever.
